String.name: SapConsolex64ProductDescription
String.En: SAP Console (64 Bit) is a framework in which several components work together enabling users to access and execute R/3 from character based device or web enabled handled device. SAP Console supports character-cell terminals, including radio frequency (RF) devices, and web-equipped devices. The main components involved are "SAP Console" and "SAP Console Administrator".
String.De: SAP Console (64 Bit) is a framework in which several components work together enabling users to access and execute R/3 from character based device or web enabled handled device. SAP Console supports character-cell terminals, including radio frequency (RF) devices, and web-equipped devices. The main components involved are "SAP Console" and "SAP Console Administrator".

String.name: SapConsolex64DestDirPrompt
String.En: Choose the path to the SAP Console (64 Bit) installation directory
String.De: Wählen Sie das SAP Console (64 Bit) Zielverzeichnis aus
